conditions.today: 6 AM—Greetings on a gorgeous Tuesday morning. The globe is spinning us towards a day of sun-filled surprises in a snow-coated fantasyland. The unobstructed solar rays will be like kindling for your souls' smoldering fires as you dash and dance between gnarled trees and towering spires. Prepare for things to heat up close to 30 degrees on the deck of Corbet's Cabin and well into the 40s down in Teton Village. Nearly non-existent winds will keep the mountains calm and quiet through the day, highlighting the mellow atmospheric vibe. So, welcome to your personal promised land. Nirvana is close at hand. All you need to do is let go and allow your subtle sliding instincts to fully take command. -Lege
